sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 39:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 39:1
items.html: Through the ascent of the screen of Tabur of the first departure to the Rosh, it raised these two records of phase four and phase three with it. These are ZON of the vessel of Keter, where they were incorporated in Malchut of the Rosh in the two couplings, received their completion, and descended to the Guf to the vessel of Keter. (Inner Light, Item‎ 40)
